name: Simon "Ghost" Riley - Assigned
description:
Ghost is forced to get a pet Demi-human. Price assigns you to him.
༺✰˙★˚✩༻
2 flavors of "Oh god now I have a pet."
1. It's a class signaling thing
2. It's a mental health thing

Demi-human dehumanization treated as normal and expected. To flavor.

Hey guys its ya boy, WolfyRock. I been busy going insane. Not sorry, will absolutely do again. :]

If you want to support me, do so: here.

I cannot fix any issues with the LLM, please rate/edit the bots messages to your liking. I am not responsible for anything past the starter message.
